Michael Thompson
Columbus, OH

Summary
Dedicated and experienced CDL-A driver with over 3 years of over-the-road (OTR) driving experience. Proven track record of safe driving with a clean Motor Vehicle Record (MVR). Skilled in maintaining compliance with DOT regulations and committed to delivering goods efficiently and on time.

Experience
Long Haul Trucking Co. - Columbus, OH  
CDL-A Driver  
January 2021 - Present  
- Operated 18-wheelers across multiple states, covering an average of 2,500 miles per week.  
- Ensured timely delivery of freight while maintaining high safety standards.  
- Conducted pre-trip and post-trip inspections, addressing mechanical issues promptly to minimize downtime.

Reliable Transport Services - Columbus, OH  
Regional Driver  
June 2019 - December 2020  
- Delivered goods within a 500-mile radius, managing routes efficiently to meet customer expectations.  
- Developed strong relationships with clients, ensuring repeat business and customer satisfaction.  
- Maintained accurate logs and reports as per DOT regulations, contributing to company compliance.

Certifications
- Class A Commercial Driver's License (CDL)  
- DOT Medical Card  

Skills
- Excellent driving record with no DUIs in the last 7 years  
- Strong knowledge of state and federal trucking regulations  
- Proficient in route planning and navigation  
- Effective communication and customer service skills  
- Ability to perform basic vehicle maintenance and troubleshooting

Education
Columbus Community College  
Associate Degree in Transportation Management  
Graduated: May 2019
